content: Qabû (from Akkadian, meaning 'to say/speak') is an AI-first web presence platform for small businesses. Instead of a traditional website with static pages and tabs, every business gets a subdomain (name.qabu.net) where the primary interface is a conversation. Customers simply ask what they need — hours, services, pricing, directions — and the AI responds instantly, accurately, and naturally from the business's knowledge base.

Each business gets a name.qabu.net site powered by its own AI assistant. The business owner builds a knowledge base by talking to their Qabû — no forms, no dashboards. That same AI answers customers on multiple channels: the qabu.net site, Facebook page comments, Facebook Messenger DMs, and future channels like WhatsApp and Instagram. One knowledge base, served everywhere.

Setting up a Qabû is as easy as creating a Facebook page. A business owner signs up, pays a monthly subscription, and has an AI-first web presence live within minutes. No domain registration, no hosting setup, no design decisions, no development, no deployment, no technical maintenance. The owner meets their Qabû in a chat interface and builds the knowledge base through conversation — just by talking about their business.

Qabû is a monthly SaaS subscription. Three tiers are planned: Starter (~$20/month) for solo professionals, Professional (~$100/month) for active businesses, and Premium (~$300/month) for high-volume businesses like multi-doctor clinics. Every plan includes the subdomain, hosting, AI-powered customer support, and multi-channel integration. No hidden costs for domain, design, or development.

Qabû takes accuracy seriously because wrong information has real consequences. A gatekeeper model screens every message to filter trolling, off-topic requests, and prompt injection. The main response model answers strictly from the knowledge base — it does not speculate or fill gaps with general knowledge. When the AI cannot confidently answer, it follows an escalation protocol: apologize, collect the customer's contact info, notify the business owner, and ensure the question gets answered.

Qabû was founded by Roy (technical lead) and Nevo (management and sales), based in Israel. To learn more or get started with your own Qabû site, reach out to us at qabu.net. We're currently onboarding our first customers and would love to help your business get an AI-first web presence.
